headline: Paycom Software (PAYC) Stock Valuation Check After Prolonged Shareholder Returns Weakness
summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) is back in focus for investors after recent share price weakness, with the stock down about 3% over the past week and about 4% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Paycom Software. That recent weakness sits against a wider picture where the share price is down 13.23% year to date and the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 46.79%, while the 5 year total shareholder return is down 61.07%. This suggests momentum has been fading over time. If Paycom’s...
